zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Wentworth於1480年出生在英國時，他的父親Thomas Roydon II28歲，母親Lady Jane Johanna Clifton24歲。他於1511年8月6日與Margaret Whetenhall在英國肯特易亞斯特 比可哈姆結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和9個女兒的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Wentworth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from Wentworth in Yorkshire. The placename probably derives from the Old English personal name Wintra + Old English worth ‘enclosure’.
habitational name from Wentworth in Cambridgeshire, which has the same etymology as the placename in 1 above.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Wentworth was born in 1480, in England, his father, Thomas Roydon II, was 28 and his mother, Lady Jane Johanna Clifton, was 24. He married Margaret Whetenhall on 6 August 1511, in East Peckham, Kent, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 9 daughters.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Wentworthが1480年にイギリスで生まれた時，父Thomas Roydon IIは28歳，母Lady Jane Johanna Cliftonは24歳であった。1511年8月6日にイギリスケントエアスト ペックハムでMargaret Whetenhallと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と9人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Wentworth(이)가 1480년 영국에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Roydon II(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Jane Johanna Clifton(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1511년 8월 6일 영국 켄트 이스트 펙함에서 Margaret Whetenhall(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 아홉 명의 딸을 두었다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Wentworth родился в 1480 г. в местности Англия, его отцу по имени Thomas Roydon II было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Jane Johanna Clifton, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Whetenhall 6 августа 1511 г. в местности эаст пеккхам, кэнт, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 9 дочерей.
